globalNews.title: One killed and dozens injured in Iranian drone strikes on Kuwait airport
globalNews.summary: Iran says the attack on Kuwait was in retaliation for earlier US strikes on an Iranian oil tanker and island.

globalNews.title: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg as Putin's flagship economic forum opens
globalNews.summary: Several long-range drones struck oil storage facilities near the city, days before Vladimir Putin is due to address the event.

globalNews.title: Foreign nationals among at least 21 killed in Delhi fire
globalNews.summary: Many victims were South Asians who had travelled to India for treatment or to accompany relatives.

globalNews.title: Eight killed after drone hits bus in Russian-occupied part of Ukraine
globalNews.summary: The bus was hit in the eastern Donetsk region, an official says.

globalNews.title: Shell pumped oil through Nigeria pipeline for years despite pollution evidence, documents show
globalNews.summary: The oil giant says the documents ignore the critical context of the complex operating environment at the time.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin copying 2022 'almost perfectly' as trader sees key support failing
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin traders warned of a key BTC price support trend line failing as 2022 bear market history continued to repeat.

cryptoNews.title: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
cryptoNews.summary: The ESMA says crypto companies without MiCA authorization must stop serving EU clients from July 1, even if their licence applications remain under review.

cryptoNews.title: Hyperliquid bear turns bullish after losing over $46M shorting HYPE
cryptoNews.summary: The whale is now backing Arthur Hayes’ favored HYPE, ZEC and NEAR plays, signaling a sharp pivot toward momentum-led crypto bets.

cryptoNews.title: Ethereum drops to 14-week lows: Can ETH price hold $1.8K support?
cryptoNews.summary: Ethereum price slides to a 14-week low as weakening demand and persistent ETF outflows put the key $1,800 support at risk.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

aiNews.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
aiNews.summary: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

aiNews.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
aiNews.summary: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

aiNews.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
aiNews.summary: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

aiNews.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
aiNews.summary: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage.

aiNews.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
aiNews.summary: Coralogix is among a growing number of infrastructure firms betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for tools that can monitor their behavior, troubleshoot failures, and prov
